feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >i am forgotten
entry.content: >i am forgotten
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Skid Row [Atlantic, 1989] Bio plays up their anti-"formula" "bad-itude," leaving…
entry.content: Skid Row [Atlantic, 1989] Bio plays up their anti-"formula" "bad-itude," leaving open the question of whether any of these double-platinum Jerseyoid bar boys has recorded professionally before. Sounds like someone knows the formula: metal guitar plus amped-to-10 frontman times pop structure equals East Coast G N' R. Class animus is their excuse, the 9-to-5 dead end rejected for salvation by sleaze. Female characters include three hookers, a junkie, a classy bitch, a shotgun bride, a cheater who
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Explain why only Abrahamic religions are criticized for being anti-freedom and a…
entry.content: Explain why only Abrahamic religions are criticized for being anti-freedom and anti-individuality, while Dharmic religions are not, despite doing exactly the same thing—bearing in mind that Hindu gods want humanity to evolve into an ego-less hive mind. Literally everything that JRPGs accuse Abrahamic religions of applies equally to Dharmic ones.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Word to the wise: if you play a game with public numeric ping on the player list…
entry.content: Word to the wise: if you play a game with public numeric ping on the player list some sad stalker fuck creep is gonna be there lurking and waiting to get your ping and triangulate it with the server location and then you're fucked. THANKS A LOT VALVE!
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /nohunogro/: bag lunch edition
entry.content: no humans, nothing gross: no hue no gro. The other ai threads are full of yucky stuff that makes me sick up when I try to eat lunch. So, for this reason, it's time for a new thread that lacks humans. This will solve that problem completely. You can hint at human existences, that's not an issue. But, no humans are to be visible. like even if there is a car, it must be a driverless car, or driven by an animal. However, it can't be a furry or any kind of deformed thing or chimera. Those fall under
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Are you signing the ballot initiative?
entry.content: If there was a ballot initiative in the next election that illegalized hollyjew from remaking the same movie over and over and over again, illegalized prequals, illegalized spinoffs, illegalized sequels, illegalized multiverses, illegalized inception shit (like "I Play Rocky"); resulting in every movie being original, would you sign it?

entry.title: /int/ International: I miss my country
entry.content: This country isn't Argentina. Brown people have ruined it to such an extent that it can no longer be called the same country. Argentines used to be proud descendants of Italians, Spaniards, and other European immigrants. The modern "Argentine" is nothing more than a brown subhuman who has more in common with any other Latinx than with me. Now, thanks to all that WC drama, everyone thinks that's what real Argentines are like It's depressing This is no longer my country. It doesn't represent me.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Google engineers are retarded midwits
entry.content: I was using streetview the other day and stumbled on an old spot not yet updated. A blast from the past furnished within me a tingling sense of nostalgia. Then I remembered one of the reasons I can't stand google engineers: they don't understand 99% sometimes being better than 100%. In runescape, there is a famous fence that hasn't been updated in 20 years. It's shoved into a corner, and you almost never interact with it. The playerbase went bonkers during a graphical update, pressuring the team
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Are 1bits and ternary models the start of a new local ai era?
entry.content: It was previously thought impossible to create a 1bit model that didn't become lobotomized to the point it can barely string to words together but now thanks to big daddy google its possible to make 8b models fit in 1 gb and 27b models fit in 4 gb and benching them has shown they perform 90-95% as good as fp16 versions of their models.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I'm going to tell you a different story today instead of the regular old spiel, …
entry.content: I'm going to tell you a different story today instead of the regular old spiel, its about captivity. Years back, I was providing volunteer leadership in a local penitentiary. I worked with the head guard, a big, burly, bowlegged brute named Brad, mean as the devil. All the prisoners were afraid of him, even the murderers. And one day Brad said to me, "Fresh, I want you to get out of here. I want you to get out of here right now because I can tell you're a man who loves freedom." And I said, "Wel
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Really, really depressed. Last two years the conversation has been somewhat dece…
entry.content: Really, really depressed. Last two years the conversation has been somewhat decent. The debate was interesting. It was polarizing but harmless, kinda. They have now started bullying people not embracing AI or "agentic coding". Now people need to specify "manually writing code". That's a weird thing now. It's all buzzwords. Everyone is doing 200 projects a week. More buzzwords. No jobs. I have no hope and no future.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

It's (You) and me I know it's my destiny Dubs! Oh, you're my best friend On a board we must defend Dubs, gotta check 'em all! entry.title: /g/ Technology: Software in the US
entry.content: I just realized that, actually and factually, in the US you basically get worse software overall compared to the EU. As in, Windows 11 comes with actual bloatware & recall, you also miss some crucial GPEdit options to remove said things. Also the recent LG TV scandal is US only, meaning, Americans literally get Adware installed when they plug in their LG monitor. How come this is a thing? Do you guys not fight for shit? I mean, not like EU fags didn't just get raped by Chat Control, but still, d
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why doth academic culture violate its own decrees, but with strict canons guarde…
entry.content: Why doth academic culture violate its own decrees, but with strict canons guardeth its place at the feeding trough? Shrouded in the names of talented people of the past, it devoureth the meanings and skills of generations gone. When did Art turn into a caste of bureaucrats, who comprehend nothing of its essence?

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Sometimes I look up the tactics that predators use to groom children, you know, …
entry.content: Sometimes I look up the tactics that predators use to groom children, you know, to keep up with the meta. I don't think i have what it takes to be a groomer, since apparently they need to use fear/shame/coercion at the end of it all. And i don't wanna hurt a little girl's feelings, or make her feel scared. Ideally she would want to explore innocent feelings, like kisses. And i would want to just be honest with her that other adults wouldn't like that and that I, not her, would get in trouble if
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Built an internet radio room because I miss listening together
entry.content: I got tired of music apps being endless recommendation engines, so I built something different. It's an online radio room where people hang out, chat, submit tracks, and vote on what gets played next. its called signalradio.app The idea isn't to replace Spotify or YouTube. It's to recreate that feeling of discovering music with other people online. Every room has its own vibe. Right now I'm building rooms for rock, hip-hop, ambient, jazz, synthwave, classical, and more. No influencers. No algori
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Community-powered internet radio.
entry.content: I spent the last year building something because I got tired of algorithms deciding what I should see and hear. It's called SignalRadio.app The idea is simple: One global room. People from anywhere in the world can tune in, chat, submit music, and collectively vote on what the station plays. No influencers. No endless scrolling. No recommendation algorithm. Just a strange little corner of the internet that always has someone awake. Every room has its own atmosphere. I'm building them like places
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: >Who's your favorite composer? >Richard Strauss ("Strauß" means "ostrich" in Ger…
entry.content: >Who's your favorite composer? >Richard Strauss ("Strauß" means "ostrich" in German) Unironically, why did at least one German family name itself after a flightless bird from Africa?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: Sverigetråden Bukowskiupplagan
entry.content: han står i rutan, ulf, en likkista med slips, och säger försvarsrätt med en mun som aldrig sugit av en hemlös gud. israel, hans krigsbarn av splitter, läcker var ur en bucklig termos medan barnens avslitna hälar bokförs i asfaltens räknekvarn. jag sitter här med min lever som ett spybälte och ser kostymhajar kopulera i en sörja av tarmvred och järn. ingen sång, bara politikens missfallsblod rinner längs hakan på en jävla eftermiddag där till och med hatet fått ruttna liggsår. ge mig en flaska ti
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.content: *chuckles*

entry.title: /b/ Random: Old VN and general PC-98 games
entry.content: These games look gorgeous and nothing will ever be as beautiful as the late 80s - early 00s in terms of graphics, and these games were truly immersive in a way that today's games don't come close to. They're emotionally immersive. The aesthetics alone! One single screenshot has more personality than an entire modern game in 4K. Have you ever fallen in love with a character from VNs or dating sims? What are your favorites? You think they could return?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /o/ Auto: This photo was taken in 2008 in California. Anyone have any idea what's going on…
entry.content: This photo was taken in 2008 in California. Anyone have any idea what's going on with the licence plate on the car? I've checked and the earliest upload date is back in 2008, so it's not some AI bullshit or upscaling.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.content: >Monsters walks slowly and follow certain unbreakable rules
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This movie came out in Japan earlier this week. I just saw it tonight. It was gr…
entry.content: This movie came out in Japan earlier this week. I just saw it tonight. It was great. Wonderful acting. Bear was the villain. Nice balance of suspense, jumpscares, and violence without going too much in any direction. I enjoyed it. It deserves the praise.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
